title: thymus glabrescens f. senilis
intro: Thymus glabrescens f. senilis, also known as the Japanese silver thyme, is a fragrant and low-growing herb belonging to the Thymus genus. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Thymus glabrescens f. senilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory issues.
